ops.text:
STAGE 3/3 COMPLETE — dataset card + verdict. No LLM spend this stage (card + verdict are derived from stage-1/2 artifacts; ~$0).

DELIVERABLE: /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E24/out/CARD.md — dataset card covering what was extracted (14-field schema, cc-transcript sweep, clean/dedup criteria), coverage (2018 rows / 464 sessions / 58 repos / span 2026-04-25→2026-07-07; header/option-count/multi-select/pick-position distributions), the group-by-session split (train 1803 / eval 215, zero overlap), the full 4-baseline table (single- and multi-select), and known biases (single-user corpus, mirror-only coverage caveat, option-ordering/position leak, temporal/recency window, 24% unmodelable custom residual, truncated 2000-char context, substring multi-select parsing). Ran slop-cop; violations are all technical-reference register (em-dash appositives, colon-before-definition, bold-term caveat bullets, unit parentheticals) — no fluff/hedge slop, register correct for a dataset card, left as-is.

VERDICT (criterion is MET). Pre-registered success criterion (stage 1): >=500 clean decisions extracted AND a baseline table with accuracy/ECE/Brier. Delivered: 2018 clean decisions (4x floor), 0/2018 broken, plus a 4-baseline accuracy/ECE/Brier table on a session-held-out eval split. Human picks are ground truth so this verdict stands without the instrument card. Headline numbers: n_decisions=2018; best single-select accuracy 0.579 (B1_majority_header == B3_calibrated_logreg tie); NO baseline beats the trivial always-predict-option-0 prior 0.574 (all accuracy CIs ~[0.49,0.65] overlap); best Brier(multiclass)=B2_retrieval_opus 0.585; best ECE=B1_majority_position 0.026. Scientific caution, not a green light: the difficulty floor IS the position-ordering prior, opus+retrieval does not clear it, ~24% of picks are unmodelable custom answers. Downstream E29 (AskUserQuestion FT) and cc-factory auto-answer calibration inherit this floor as their gate.

Attaching CARD.md + decisions.stats.json + decisions.jsonl (the dataset itself) alongside the stage-2 preds/metrics already on this log. Verify lane: re-derive the baseline table from the attached preds via scripts/e24_metrics.py; re-derive coverage stats from decisions.jsonl via scripts/validate_decisions.py + write_stats.py.
